About.title: Our Legacy
About.subtitle: Crafting premium looks since 2010. Experience the art of grooming in a luxury atmosphere.
About.mission: To provide every gentleman with a confidence-boosting experience through expert grooming and personalized care.
About.history: Starting as a small family shop, we have grown into the city's premier destination for those who value style and hygiene.

values.title: Core Values
values.qualityDesc: We use only the finest products and precise techniques.
values.hygieneDesc: Sterilized tools and a clean environment for your safety.
values.experienceDesc: Our master barbers bring years of expertise to every cut.

Services.title: Our Services
Services.description: Choose from our wide range of professional grooming services tailored to your style.

packages.title: Featured Packages
packages.subtitle: Exclusive VIP experiences for the modern gentleman.
